the biter the biter is a fighter with

Bard or you can go two weapon fighting

another fighting style but most
importantly it gives access to the blade
flourishes these little Maneuvers let

creatures within a five foot radius of
you combo this with the Battle Master

Jack of all trade Buffs all your skills

gotta remember action surge does let you

that makes you god tier passive support
able to hold on to a blessed spell that

effortlessly then your high wisdom Buffs
your wisdom saving throws which are the
second most common behind dexterity

anyway so you're super resilient as well
and then of course there are just a ton
of great clerics subclasses to choose

role play spells for a rogue the
Twilight domain cleric is also very

the strength to pull it off it also
gives you a frankly ridiculous 300 feet
of dark vision for just a single level

advantage on initiative roles especially
if you're a bug bear race for that juicy

for a skill monkey build my favorite
though is probably the soul knife Rogue
some additional pseudo spell casting via
